summary: Applied the round-1 ad-hoc review fixes to close the remaining fail-open paths, remove the last live review-runtime mirror, enforce strict learning behavior, promote conditional-freeze outputs correctly, and align audit/postmortem output to one machine contract.
highlights: Governance JSON files are now required and parse-checked before board execution.
Shared review config loading now throws on missing or malformed governed files.
The shared learning engine now throws on missing or malformed boxed review context and invalid learning JSON.
The board no longer swallows learning failures.
The live board path now uses the shared review engine runtime directly.
Conditional freeze now promotes canonical artifacts and returns success semantics.
All three major audit/postmortem artifacts now share a canonical audit envelope.
The board now overrides illegal frozen_with_conditions verdicts when material issues remain.
